Prospective Students

Join Our Group

I am actively recruiting PhD students for Fall 2026 and Spring 2027 with interests in LLM, AI Security, Hardware Security, and Side-Channel Analysis.

What I look for:

  • Strong mathematical background (linear algebra, probability, statistics)
  • Programming skills (Python, C/C++)
  • Passion for research and security

Fully-funded positions with competitive stipend and tuition waiver are available.

To apply: Please fill out the Prospective Student Form or email your CV and a brief research statement to ruyiding@lsu.edu.
